changelog:
• Fixed the GitHub Pages deployment so the web version of Studio loads instead of returning a 404. The release script now mirrors the entire built app (HTML, assets, icons) into the published folder, not just the OTA bundle zip.
• Republishing this version forces every device to re-evaluate the OTA banner, including phones that had stale "already seen" markers from earlier 3.0.13 / 3.0.14 attempts.
